# ViralEvo — Viral Content Trend Advisor

## What this skill does
ViralEvo monitors content platforms, predicts which topics will go viral in a specific niche,
and self-improves its prediction accuracy weekly by analyzing its own prediction errors.

## Available commands
- `node {baseDir}/scripts/onboarding.js` — first-time setup wizard
- `node {baseDir}/scripts/collect.js` — fetch fresh data from all configured sources
- `python3 {baseDir}/scripts/report.py` — generate today's trend report
- `python3 {baseDir}/scripts/verify.py --hours 24` — verify yesterday's predictions
- `python3 {baseDir}/scripts/verify.py --hours 72` — verify 72h-old predictions
- `python3 {baseDir}/scripts/weekly_review.py` — run self-evolution (Mondays recommended)
- `python3 {baseDir}/scripts/keywords.py --show` — view keyword index
- `python3 {baseDir}/scripts/keywords.py --add "term"` — add keyword
- `python3 {baseDir}/setup.py` — check all system requirements

## Natural language triggers (agent should run collect → report)
- "今天该发什么" / "what should I post today"
- "有什么趋势" / "any trends"
- "给我看趋势报告" / "show me trends"
- "我的赛道有什么热点" / "what's trending in my niche"

## Feedback intake (agent should log to personal_feedback table)
When user says things like:
- "那个视频发了，获得了80k播放" → extract: views=80000, match to recent topic
- "The hair clips post did well — 50k views on TikTok" → extract: views=50000, platform=tiktok
Always show matched topic and ask for confirmation before logging.

## Data location
All data: ~/.openclaw/workspace/viralevo/
Database: ~/.openclaw/workspace/viralevo/data/trends.db
Config:   ~/.openclaw/workspace/viralevo/config.json
Reports:  ~/.openclaw/workspace/viralevo/reports/

## Privacy note
All collected data and prediction models are stored locally on the user's machine.
The skill makes outbound requests only to fetch public trend signals (HackerNews, Dev.to,
Reddit, Product Hunt, Tavily). Tavily receives only search query strings — no personal data.
